content_body: We've stayed in various properties over the last 13 years in the area. This home has the best sunset views we've ever seen! The sun set directly over the mountain each evening and it was majestic. The home is clean, floorplan was spacious, everything was in perfect working order and the beds were comfy. We enjoyed the fireplace one evening as well as the hot tub and the two teenage boys we had with us enjoyed hanging out in the media room area. I really can't say enough about the location. It's SO close to Blue Ridge's downtown and the lake we couldn't believe it. We cooked and the kitchen and grill were great. On our first morning we sat and had coffee on the deck and saw wild turkey, deer and a black bear all within 50-100 feet of the cabin. Also, the management company representatives were professional and efficient. Great mountainside cabin.
title: "Best Sunset Views We've Ever Seen!"
